about.title: About App
about.description: Welcome to AltayarVIP, your exclusive gateway to a world of luxury travel and premium services. We are dedicated to providing you with seamless booking experiences, exclusive rewards, and unparalleled customer support.

features.support247Desc: We are here for you anytime

company.title: About the Company
company.intro: AltayarVIP Travel Company is a leading pioneer in the global travel and tourism industry.

history.title: Our History
history.content: Established with a vision to redefine luxury, AltayarVIP has grown from a local boutique agency to an international powerhouse. Over the years, we have built a reputation for excellence, trust, and innovation in the travel sector.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the world's most trusted partner for luxury travel, leveraging technology to provide seamless, personalized, and unforgettable journeys for our elite members.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.content: Trust, Transparency, and Transcendence. We believe in building lasting relationships with our clients through honesty and exceptional service quality.

memberships.title: About Memberships
memberships.intro: Our membership program is designed to reward loyalty with unparalleled benefits across multiple tiers.

tiers.title: Membership Tiers
tiers.content: From Silver to Diamond, each tier offers a unique set of privileges. As you move up, you unlock higher discounts, priority support, and exclusive access to luxury events.

benefits.title: Key Benefits
benefits.content: Enjoy room upgrades, free airport transfers, personal concierge services, and significant savings on international bookings. Your membership is your passport to a world of luxury.

loyalty.title: Loyalty & Rewards
loyalty.content: Earn points on every dollar spent. Use your points for future bookings, upgrades, or donate them to our community initiatives.

club.title: About Altayar Club
club.intro: The Altayar Club is a full-service ecosystem for travel enthusiasts, offering more than just bookings.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Honeymoon planning, medical tourism, conference arrangements, and private jet charters. We handle everything from the mundane to the extraordinary.

guarantee.title: Best Price Guarantee
guarantee.content: We use advanced GDS systems and direct partnerships with hotel chains to ensure you always get the most competitive rates in the market.

curated.title: Curated Experiences
curated.content: Our travel experts hand-pick every destination and service, ensuring they meet the high standards expected by our club members.

community.title: About Our Community
community.intro: Explore the vibrant space where Altayar members connect and share their journeys.

sharing.title: Share Your Experience
sharing.content: Our platform allows you to post photos, reviews, and tips about your latest trips. Your feedback helps fellow members plan their perfect getaways.

networking.title: Member Networking
networking.content: Connect with like-minded travelers from around the globe. Share insights, discover hidden gems, and build new friendships within our elite circle.

support.title: Community Support
support.content: Our community is built on mutual respect and helpfulness. Whether you need advice on a destination or help with a booking, our members are here for you.

about.copyright: Â© {{year}} AltayarVIP Travel Company. All rights reserved.
about.developedBy: Developed And Powered by diPencil Studio

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a booking, or contact customer support. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and payment information.
privacyPolicy.section2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, including to process transactions, send you booking confirmations, and communicate with you about updates and offers.
privacyPolicy.section3Content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this privacy policy or with your consent. We may share information with vendors, consultants, and other service providers who need access to such information to carry out work on our behalf.
privacyPolicy.section4Content: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.
privacyPolicy.section5Content: You may update or correct your account information at any time by logging into your account settings. You may also opt out of receiving promotional communications from us.

termsOfService.title: Terms and Conditions
termsOfService.introContent: Welcome to "AltayarVip". The company has extensive experience in providing all tourism services through electronic marketing via the Internet and marketing management Tourism, booking hotels, motels, hotel apartments, and booking airline tickets to all countries of the world, whether for travel or tourism, with the highest percentage of discounts that the member can obtain.
termsOfService.termsUseContent: The company targets age groups of no less than 21 years and has full legal capacity of all nationalities. All data that the company obtains from the subscribing member has all privacy and confidentiality.
termsOfService.termsServiceContent: The company provides all tourism services to its member in terms of obtaining the highest percentage of discounts according to the packages provided to the subscriber by the company.
termsOfService.prohibitedContent: The member is not entitled to remove any copyright, trademark or other notices ownership of any part of the Services, or modify, distribute, license, lease, sell, or resell the Services.
termsOfService.paymentContent: In order for the member to use the services provided by the company, the member must pay an amount in exchange for the membership subscription to obtain these services.
termsOfService.privacyContent: The company undertakes to maintain the security and confidentiality of the member's personal data at all times.
termsOfService.footerText: Thank you for your efforts, enjoy better services with us (AltayarVIP)

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.heroSubtitle: Search our FAQ or contact support
helpCenter.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I need help with Altayar VIP app.
helpCenter.weAreHere: We are here to help you 24/7

questions.q1: How can I book a trip?
questions.a1: You can book a trip by browsing available offers on the homepage, selecting your preferred offer, and completing the payment.
questions.a2: We accept credit cards, e-wallets, and bank transfers.
questions.q3: How can I cancel a booking?
questions.a3: You can cancel your booking from your bookings page. Please review the cancellation policy for terms.
questions.q4: How do I use reward points?
questions.a4: You can use your points to get discounts when booking. Every 100 points = 1 SAR.
questions.a5: Club Gifts are a percentage of your booking value added to your wallet for future bookings.
questions.q6: How can I upgrade my membership?
questions.a6: Go to the Membership page, browse available plans, and select the one that suits you. Payment is secure and instant.
questions.a7: Refunds depend on the specific terms of the booking. Check the fine print on your booking voucher for details.
questions.q8: Can I book for someone else?
questions.a8: Yes, just enter their details in the 'Guest Information' section during checkout.
questions.q9: How do I contact customer support?
questions.a9: You can use Live Chat in the app, WhatsApp us, or call our hotline directly from the Help Center page.
questions.q10: What happens if my flight is delayed?
questions.a10: Airlines usually handle delays directly. However, our support team can assist you in finding alternatives if needed.
questions.q11: How can I change my profile information?
questions.a11: Go to Profile > Edit Profile to update your name, email, or phone number.
questions.a12: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal and payment data.
questions.q13: Do I need a visa for my trip?
questions.a13: Visa requirements depend on your destination and nationality. We recommend checking with the embassy or using our visa service assistance.
questions.a14: Currently, we offer full payment options. Check back later for installment plans.
questions.q15: Where can I find my booking voucher?
questions.a15: Your voucher is emailed to you and also available in the 'My Bookings' section of the app.
questions.q16: How do I reset my password?
questions.a16: On the login screen, tap 'Forgot Password' and follow the instructions sent to your email.
questions.q17: Are taxes included in the price?
questions.a17: Yes, all prices displayed include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
questions.a18: Yes, you can add notes (e.g., dietary preferences, wheelchair access) during the booking process.
questions.a19: Baggage policies vary by airline and ticket class. Check your specific flight details for this information.
questions.q20: How do I leave a review?
questions.a20: After your trip is completed, you will receive a notification to rate your experience and leave feedback.
questions.q21: Can I book a car rental?
questions.a21: Yes, we offer car rental services in many destinations. Look for the 'Car Rental' section on the home screen.
questions.a22: Yes, we highly recommend adding travel insurance to your booking for peace of mind. You can select it during checkout.
questions.q23: How can I request an invoice?
questions.a23: Invoices are automatically generated and available in your booking details or sent to your email.
questions.q24: What is the maximum number of people per booking?
questions.a24: This depends on the service provider. Generally, for hotels, it's 3-4 per room; for groups, please contact our support.
questions.a25: No, we believe in transparency. All mandatory fees are shown before you confirm your booking.
questions.q26: Can I earn points on every booking?
questions.a26: Yes, all verified bookings earn you membership points based on your current tier.
questions.a27: Our loyalty program rewards frequent travelers with points, exclusive deals, and tier-based benefits like room upgrades.
questions.q28: Can I change my flight date?
questions.a28: Date changes are subject to airline availability and fees. Contact our support team to check your options.
questions.q29: How do I know if my payment was successful?
questions.a29: You will see a confirmation screen and receive an instant email notification once the payment is processed.
questions.q30: Do you have a mobile app for Android and iOS?
questions.a30: Yes, the Altayar app is available on both the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
